title: luzula campestris var. multiflora
intro: Luzula campestris var. multiflora, also known as the meadow woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European herbalism, to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Luzula campestris var. multiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the body from disease. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
